meta.siteDescription: A wine bistrot in the heart of Cluj-Napoca. Carefully chosen wines, warm atmosphere, sincere hospitality.

home.heroTitle: The right wine for the right moment.
home.heroSubtitle: A wine bistrot in the heart of Cluj-Napoca.
home.marquee: HAiViNO is at 23 Inocențiu Micu Klein Street, Cluj-Napoca
home.introTitle: A place about wine, about taste, about us.
introBody: HAiViNO is our wine bistrot in Cluj-Napoca — built for people who love good wine and long conversations.
Our selection revolves around carefully chosen Romanian and European wines, paired with simple, tasty, honest plates.
Come for a glass — or a bottle — and stay a while.
atmosphereBody: We want every guest to feel at home: warm light, quiet music, small tables, long conversations.
Inocențiu Micu Klein Street is one of the most beautiful streets in central Cluj — come and discover it with us, over a glass of wine.

valueQuartet.title: The wine
valueQuartet.body: A careful selection of Romanian and European wines, by the glass and by the bottle.

valueQuartet.title: The kitchen
valueQuartet.body: Simple, tasty plates designed to walk hand-in-hand with the wine.

valueQuartet.title: The atmosphere
valueQuartet.body: Warm, intimate, unhurried. The perfect place for an evening worth telling about.

valueQuartet.title: The location
valueQuartet.body: In central Cluj-Napoca, at 23 Inocențiu Micu Klein Street.

about.title: About HAiViNO
about.lead: HAiViNO is a place about wine, about friends, and about Cluj.
story: We wanted a place where the wine is the protagonist, not the decor — a small, carefully thought wine bistrot where every bottle has a story.
We work with Romanian and European producers we know and trust.
The rest of the lines here are temporary. We'll write them together when the HAiViNO story is ready to be told.

values.title: The wine
values.body: Wine is the reason, not the decoration. We curate carefully, not broadly.

values.title: The people
values.body: Guests are more than customers. The team is more than staff.

values.title: The place
values.body: Central Cluj deserves a wine bistrot that lives up to it.

menu.title: Menu
menu.intro: The HAiViNO menu is built around the wine. Below is a placeholder structure — the real menu will live here as soon as it's finalized.
menu.placeholderNote: Placeholder content — the real menu will replace these sections.

sections.title: Wines by the glass
sections.body: A rotating selection of Romanian and European wines, by the glass.

sections.title: Wines by the bottle
sections.body: Our wine list — by region, grape variety, and producer.

sections.title: Small plates
sections.body: Cheeses, cured meats, olives, bread. All designed to go with the wine.

sections.title: Warm plates
sections.body: A few seasonal dishes — simple and tasty.

menu.allergenNote: For allergen and ingredient information, please ask our staff.

contact.title: Contact
contact.lead: HAiViNO is here for you. Call, write, or drop by.
contact.formIntro: For reservations, questions, or partnerships — fill in the form and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
